entities.name: P15 Premature Complete

entities.context: Anti-pattern: fabricating API limits instead of citing docs or admitting unknown

entities.name: P19 Skip Errors
entities.context: Anti-pattern: failing to use try/except and state verification

entities.context: Anti-pattern: missing docstrings and ASSUMPTIONS.md for placeholders

entities.name: P22 Wrong Language
entities.context: Anti-pattern: defaulting to Python blindly instead of matching language to task

entities.name: Think Plan Execute
entities.context: Methodology framework with time allocation: Think 40%, Plan 30%, Execute 10%, Review 20%

entities.name: Skip Planning
entities.context: Anti-pattern: skipping planning prompt for system design work

entities.context: Anti-pattern: attempting design work instead of routing to Architect

entities.name: Architect
entities.context: Persona responsible for system design; receives routing for design work

entities.name: Python

entities.name: ASSUMPTIONS.md
entities.context: Documentation file for recording placeholder assumptions
